svg.title: Lebanese Arabic family tree vocabulary chart
svg.desc: A first-party SVG family tree built from local CSV and plain-text exports for lesson 12. It maps Lebanese Arabic family terms across immediate, maternal, and paternal branches.
svg.text: First-party SVG built from the local CSV and plain-text exports for Lesson 12.

g.text: Central family terms and close relatives

svg.text: Photos are not embedded in this version because the CSV and TXT exports do not include stable photo references.
